q : ℕ

    rw [h] at hx ⊢

    rw [← HomologicalComplex.Hom.comm_apply]

IsFilterComplete.ker _ _ ((inhomogeneousCochains M).d q (q + 1)) fun i x hx ↦ by
    let y : (inhomogeneousCochains (M_ i)).X q := fun g ↦ ⟨x g, hx g⟩
    have : (inhomogeneousCochains.map (M_ i).subtype).f q y = x := funext fun _ ↦ rfl
    rw [← this, HomologicalComplex.hom.comm_apply]
    intro g; exact (HomologicalComplex.d _ _ _ y g).2

IsFilterComplete.ker _ _ ((inhomogeneousCochains M).d q (q + 1)) fun i x hx ↦ by
    let f := inhomogeneousCochains.map (M_ i).subtype
    have h : ∀ r, (M_ i).toCochains r = LinearMap.range (f.f r) := fun r ↦
      by ext; simp [Subrep.toCochains, inhomogeneousCochains, Cochains.map, LinearMap.range_pi]
    rw [h] at hx ⊢; rcases hx with ⟨y, rfl⟩
    exact ⟨_, (f.comm q (q + 1)).symm.succ_apply y⟩

⟨by
    rw [← Submodule.comap_iInf, IsFilterComplete.iInf_eq_bot, Submodule.comap_bot,
      LinearMap.ker_eq_bot]
    exact ModuleCat.mono_iff_injective.mp inferInstance⟩

end

end groupCohomology

IsFilterComplete.ker (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains q) (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains (q+1))
